name: dancinlab/bio
role: 오픈 신약설계 랩 — in-silico 치료제 설계 + Molecular Toolkit
summary: 🧬 dancinlab/bio 아키텍처 SSOT. 5-axis 양자 신약설계 프레임워크(locked) + Molecular Toolkit(WEAVE/NANOBOT/RIBOZYME/VIROCAPSID) + 207-disease 포트폴리오. 모두 in-silico (wet-lab/clinical 대기). release v1.1.0 · main.

children.name: 개요
children.role: 4 disease class × 4 verb = 16-cell matrix 전부 cure-grade 도달이 terminal goal
children.detail: 도착지 = 4 class(α암/AML·β Mendelian/SCD·γ감염병/pan-cov·δ노화/senolytic) × 4 verb (WEAVE·NANOBOT·RIBOZYME·VIROCAPSID) = 16 cell 전부 cure-grade. POC: in-silico(C0~C2) 4-class 평행 · handoff(C3+) γ-first. cure-grade DoD = ≥1 in-vivo proof → IND-eligible → phase I.

children.name: QUANTUM
children.detail: Canonical doc**: [`docs/qpu_bridge_bio_application.md`](docs/qpu_bridge_bio_application.md) (§1–§17)

children.name: WEAVE
children.detail: WEAVE 는 4 disease class 각각에 cure-grade 단백질 design 제공. Meta `.roadmap.hexa_bio` §0 의 **W 행**

children.name: VIROCAPSID
children.detail: VIROCAPSID 은 4 disease class 각각 VLP / cage 구조 design. Meta `.roadmap.hexa_bio` §0 의 **V 행**

children.name: RIBOZYME
children.detail: RIBOZYME 은 4 disease class 각각 catalytic RNA design. Meta `.roadmap.hexa_bio` §0 의 **R 행**

children.name: NANOBOT
children.detail: NANOBOT 은 4 disease class 각각 표적 분자 액추에이터 design. Meta `.roadmap.hexa_bio` §0 의 **N 행**

children.name: Molecular Toolkit
children.detail: WEAVE=multi-strand 조립 · NANOBOT=DNA-origami/LNP 액추에이터 · RIBOZYME=촉매 RNA/RNA편집 · VIROCAPSID=AAV/phage 캡시드 델리버리. 4 bio axis = n=6 τ-quartet 정사면체.

children.name: molecular glue
children.detail: - **Q (QUANTUM)**: bivalent ternary complex VQE + E3 ligase pocket geometry; induced proximity ΔΔG calculation; ternary complex (target–linker–E3) geometry critical (cooperativity α factor); CRBN-tri-

children.name: ppi
children.detail: Scope: 5-axis (QUANTUM / WEAVE / VIROCAPSID / RIBOZYME / NANOBOT) cross-cutting platform — Protein-Protein Interaction modulator paradigm

children.name: covalent
children.detail: - **Q (QUANTUM)**: covalent docking score (Glide CovDock, ICM Cov, Schrödinger CovalentDock); warhead Cys reactivity DFT calculation (B3LYP/6-31G*); transition-state energy for Michael addition; KRAS

children.name: peptide macrocycle
children.detail: - **Q (QUANTUM)**: cyclic peptide conformational sampling VQE — backbone macrocyclic ring 의 ring-flipping & cis/trans proline isomer ensemble 양자 sampling natural fit; macrocycle binding mode (chameleo

children.name: theranostic
children.detail: - **Q (QUANTUM)**: radioligand binding affinity VQE (peptide-receptor 결합 ΔG); radioisotope conjugate stability quantum-chemical (DOTA-Lu coordination geometry, kinetic inertness); radionuclide decay b

children.role: sidecar 표준 리포 하네스 — 검증·CI·거버넌스 게이트 (scientific 설계와 직교한 인프라 레이어)

children.name: Verify
children.detail: verify.checks = `hexa verify` (tier-rubric TECS-L: 🔵formal/🟢numerical/🟡citation/🟠insufficient·deferred/🔴falsified/⚪speculation-fenced · timeout 240s). `sidecar ci` 로 구동.

children.name: CI
children.detail: `.github/workflows/ci.yml` (bio-ci) — push main/master·PR 시 hexa toolchain+sidecar 설치 후 `sidecar ci` 실행.

children.name: Governance gates
children.detail: git pre-commit/pre-push 훅 = sidecar lint (protected-branch main/master·L0·doc-gate). 전역 훅은 `sidecar install` (SessionStart inject·commons).

children.name: Config
children.detail: harness.config.json (stack=hexa) + .harness/{enforcement,keywords,severity-map,prefs}.json. 이력=CHANGELOG.jsonl(append) · 현재상태 SSOT=본 파일.
